studios.name: Wit Studio, Inc
studios.detail: Wit Studio is the Japanese animation studio responsible for producing the first three seasons of Attack on Titan, known for high-quality visuals and dynamic action sequences.

studios.name: MAPPA
studios.detail: MAPPA produced popular series including Jujutsu Kaisen, Kabaneri of the Iron Fortress, and continued Attack on Titan's final seasons with acclaimed animation quality.

studios.name: Kyoto Animation
studios.detail: Known for The Melancholy of Haruhi Suzumiya, K-On!, and Silent Voice, Kyoto Animation is celebrated for exceptional art direction and character animation.

studios.name: Toei Animation
studios.detail: Pioneering studio with Dragon Ball, Dragon Ball Z, One Piece, and Sailor Moon. One of the most prolific studios in anime history.

studios.name: Studio Ghibli
studios.detail: Founded by Hayao Miyazaki and Isao Takahata, created masterpieces like Spirited Away, Howl's Moving Castle, and My Neighbor Totoro.

studios.name: Bones
studios.detail: Created Fullmetal Alchemist, Soul Eater, My Hero Academia, and Carole & Tuesday. Known for vibrant art style and dynamic action.

studios.name: ufotable
studios.detail: Produced the acclaimed Demon Slayer film and series with revolutionary animation techniques and stunning visual effects.

creators.name: Eiichiro Oda
creators.affiliation: Studio Affiliations: Professional mangaka affiliated with Shueisha.
creators.detail: Created One Piece, which began serialization in 1997 and has become the best-selling manga series in history.

creators.name: Hideaki Anno
creators.affiliation: Studio Affiliations: Founded Gainax, created Neon Genesis Evangelion.
creators.detail: Revolutionary director behind Neon Genesis Evangelion, known for psychological depth and experimental narrative techniques.

creators.name: Yoshihiro Togashi
creators.affiliation: Studio Affiliations: Published through Shueisha's Weekly Shonen Jump.
creators.detail: Creator of Yu Yu Hakusho and Hunter x Hunter, two of the most influential manga series in anime history.

creators.name: Hayao Miyazaki
creators.affiliation: Studio Affiliations: Co-founder of Studio Ghibli.
creators.detail: Master filmmaker behind Spirited Away, Howl's Moving Castle, and Princess Mononoke. Multiple Academy Award winner.

creators.name: Kohei Horikoshi
creators.affiliation: Studio Affiliations: Published through Shueisha's Weekly Shonen Jump.
creators.detail: Creator of My Hero Academia, one of the most popular modern manga and anime series worldwide.

creators.name: Kunihiko Ikuhara
creators.affiliation: Studio Affiliations: Directed for Toei Animation and independent projects.
creators.detail: Director of Sailor Moon and Utena, known for groundbreaking storytelling and visual symbolism.

creators.name: Haruo Sotozaki
creators.detail: Director of the Demon Slayer film and series, known for revolutionary animation techniques and visual innovation.
